mapper.select:
select * from public.station_info_tab
station_name like Concat('%',#{stationName},'%')
station_id_d like Concat('%',#{stationCode},'%')
and enabled = 0

select * from public.station_info_tab_zj
station_name like Concat('%',#{stationName},'%')
station_id_c like Concat('%',#{stationCode},'%')
and enabled = 0

select * from public.station_info_tab_upload
station_name like Concat('%',#{stationName},'%')
station_id_c like Concat('%',#{stationCode},'%')
and enabled = 0

select * from public.station_info_tab_all
station_name like Concat('%',#{stationName},'%')
station_id_d like Concat('%',#{stationCode},'%')
and enabled = 0

select * from public.station_info_tab_all
station_name like Concat('%',#{stationName},'%')
station_id_d like Concat('%',#{stationCode},'%')
select * from public.station_info_tab where enabled = 0
select * from public.station_info_tab_zj where enabled = 0
select * from public.station_info_tab_upload where enabled = 0
select * from public.station_info_tab_all where enabled = 0
mapper.insert: insert into public.station_info_tab_zj("station_id_c", "station_id_d", "station_name", "lon", "lat", "enabled") values (#{stationIdC}, #{stationIdD}, #{stationName}, #{lon}, #{lat}, #{enabled}) on conflict (lon,lat) do update set "enabled" = #{enabled}
mapper.select: select * from public.station_info_tab_zj where station_name = #{stationName}
mapper.insert: insert into public.model_manager_details_tab("stationname", "stationnum", "model", "status", "author", "used", "managerid", "enabled", "inserttime") values (#{stationName}, #{stationNum}, #{model}, #{status}, #{author}, #{used}, #{managerId}, #{enabled}, #{insertTime}) on conflict (stationnum,model) do update set "used" = #{used}, "managerid" = #{managerId}, "enabled" = #{enabled}, "inserttime" = #{insertTime}

insert into public.model_manager_details_tab("stationname", "stationnum", "model", "status", "author", "used", "managerid", "enabled", "inserttime") values (#{stationName}, #{stationNum}, #{model}, #{status}, #{author}, #{used}, #{managerId}, #{enabled}, #{insertTime}) on conflict (stationnum,model) do update set "used" = #{used}, "managerid" = #{managerId}, "enabled" = #{enabled}, "inserttime" = #{insertTime}

insert into public.station_info_tab("station_id_c", "station_id_d", "station_name", "lon", "lat", "zone", "zone2", "enabled", "bfz") values (#{stationIdC}, #{stationIdD}, #{stationName}, #{lon}, #{lat}, #{zone}, #{zone2}, #{enabled}, #{bfz}) on conflict (station_id_d) do update set "station_id_c" = #{stationIdC}, "station_id_d" = #{stationIdD}, "station_name" = #{stationName}, "lon" = #{lon}, "lat" = #{lat}, "enabled" = #{enabled}, "bfz" = #{bfz}
mapper.select: select * from public.station_info_tab where station_id_d = #{stationIdC}
mapper.insert: insert into public.station_info_tab_upload("station_id_c", "station_id_d", "station_name", "lon", "lat", "enabled") values (#{stationIdC}, #{stationIdD}, #{stationName}, #{lon}, #{lat}, #{enabled}) on conflict (station_name) do update set "enabled" = #{enabled}
mapper.update: update public.station_info_tab_all set enabled = 1 where station_id_d in #{id}
mapper.select: select * from public.station_info_tab_all where station_id_d in #{id}
select max(station_id_d) as maxNum from public.station_info_tab_zj
select station_id_d as maxNum from public.station_info_tab_zj where lon = #{lon} and lat = #{lat}
select max(station_id_d) as maxNum from public.station_info_tab_upload
select station_id_d as stationIdD,station_name as stationName from public.station_info_tab_upload
select id,taskname from public.task_list_tab order by inserttime desc
select id,taskname from public.task_list_tab order by inserttime desc
mapper.update: update public.task_list_tab set taskname = #{taskName} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id,taskname from public.task_list_tab where taskname = #{taskName}
select taskid,station,stationname,lon,lat,flag,station as stationidd from public.task_station_tab where taskid = #{id} order by index
mapper.delete: delete from public.task_station_tab where taskid = #{taskId} and station = #{station}
mapper.select: select * from public.province_tab
select * from public.city_tab where provinceid = #{id}
select * from public.cnty_tab where provinceid = #{provinceId} and cityId = #{id}
select * from public.stations_tab where provinceid = #{provinceId} and cityid = #{cityId} and cntyid = #{id}
select * from public.station_forcast_tab where enabled = 0
select station as stationidd,lon,lat,stationname,flag,index from public.task_station_tab where taskid = #{taskId} order by index
select station_id_d as station from public.station_info_tab_upload where station_name = #{stationName}
